ddls:
CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the respondent */,
  "geography" TEXT /* Geographical region of the respondent */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the respondent for analysis */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the respondent */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the respondent was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the respondent's information was last updated */,
  "consent" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the respondent has given consent for their data to be used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "publisher_category" TEXT /* Category under which the survey falls (e.g., News) */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Completion status of the survey (e.g., Complete, Partial) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time at which the survey was completed in UTC */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the survey was published */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the survey was closed */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the survey */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the survey */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the survey is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey to which the response belongs */,
  "question_number" INTEGER /* Question number in the survey */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer provided by the respondent for the question */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent who provided the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the response was submitted */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the response was submitted */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to submit the response (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES respondents ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_times" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response time record */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response associated with the time record */,
  "response_time_ms" INTEGER /* Time taken to answer the question in milliseconds */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the response */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_times_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES survey_responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey for which statistics are calculated */,
  "total_responses" INTEGER /* Total number of responses received for the survey */,
  "average_time_ms" REAL /* Average response time for the survey in milliseconds */,
  "completion_rate" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who completed the survey */,
  "average_response_length" INTEGER /* Average length of responses (in characters or words) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_statistics_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher conducting the survey */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being logged */,
  "completion_time" TEXT /* Completion time of the survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the survey completion */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent who completed the survey */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Total time taken to complete the survey in milliseconds */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the respondent when the survey was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES respondents ("user_id")
)
